title: Coordy
description: Copy coordinates quick pressing one button and more!
body:
![Coordy - Simple Coordinates Tool Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb5f16a1ebdaadcb732f88a4c873f3e2ddde2c38.png)

## Requirements

**[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required!**

## Description

**With this mod, you can copy coordinates pressing _left alt_.**

![copied](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f3e597a1f2a14815a243c67bf0fef5e2695f92e.jpeg)

**Also, you can change like what it copy, pressing _F7_**

![format](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66a079c4b4a3d4efa48dbeacc910f394ac6fa4a.jpeg)

**You can send your coordinates to chat quick too, by pressing X.**
![share to chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a6df6f68572b5e1c4caa0136ab46ba0da09b51a.jpeg)
